newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ X-Ray Scanner ][/p][list][*][p]Players in Germany and Netherlands will have an [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X-Ray Scanner[/url] tab in their Inventory. For those players, containers can only be opened via X-ray Scanner. The X-Ray Scanner will come preloaded with a one-time exclusive non-tradable "Genuine P250 | X-ray", which must be claimed before using the X-Ray Scanner to reveal items in other containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Keyless Containers, like Souvenir Packages, can be opened without the X-Ray Scanner.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ X-Ray Scanner ][/p][list][*][p]Players in Germany and Netherlands will have an [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X-Ray Scanner[/url] tab in their Inventory. For those players, containers can only be opened via X-ray Scanner. The X-Ray Scanner will come preloaded with a one-time exclusive non-tradable "Genuine P250 | X-ray", which must be claimed before using the X-Ray Scanner to reveal items in other containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Keyless Containers, like Souvenir Packages, can be opened without the X-Ray Scanner.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ X-Ray Scanner ][/p][list][*][p]Players in Germany and Netherlands will have an [url="https://help.steampowered.com/en/faqs/view/7336-6EBC-1923-EE1B"]X-Ray Scanner[/url] tab in their Inventory. For those players, containers can only be opened via X-ray Scanner. The X-Ray Scanner will come preloaded with a one-time exclusive non-tradable "Genuine P250 | X-ray", which must be claimed before using the X-Ray Scanner to reveal items in other containers.[/p][/*][*][p]Keyless Containers, like Souvenir Packages, can be opened without the X-Ray Scanner.[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]The Dead Hand Collection is now available, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors, and including 22 all-new gloves as rare special items.[/p][/*][*][p]Access items in the Dead Hand Collection via the Dead Hand Terminal, available as a weekly drop.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a pixel gap in a door Outside Long. [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]The Dead Hand Collection is now available, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors, and including 22 all-new gloves as rare special items.[/p][/*][*][p]Access items in the Dead Hand Collection via the Dead Hand Terminal, available as a weekly drop.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a pixel gap in a door Outside Long. [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ DEAD HAND COLLECTION ][/p][list][*][p]The Dead Hand Collection is now available, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors, and including 22 all-new gloves as rare special items.[/p][/*][*][p]Access items in the Dead Hand Collection via the Dead Hand Terminal, available as a weekly drop.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Fixed a pixel gap in a door Outside Long. [/p][/*][/list][p]Alpine[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3221491619"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: The Dead Hand
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents:
Today we're introducing the Dead Hand Collection, featuring 17 finishes from community contributors and 22 all-new gloves as rare special items. 

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/55ed2cb8da5c61796d087c29b39e0b4bd8220443.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/4d57e0881ea5a03a6dcc0ac66a84ea6d53f219a9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/35c54315ef06d422a43b8496164d4312a8e1e9bb.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f6d660c715c292dcb61866db01e789e601bce66.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3040e04dc40837b8a83a521e2c8a458566e624e1.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/a35829d7ca4d55e845ac2553ccf79d4f772968c0.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/445e79f8c96471558c870cd5fef7dd5832949352.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/645d240c446786214f9bbd82b8ef1eb08e8c7810.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/ce89d9a097570a6585b59591177e35b70fdac56c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/b1c7fbe650d6bd446d5e837f02ef8edd927e6f50.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3dbb9fd18ce41a2e99e9f8f59ee388e11c277816.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6d77e38ffad92ef4c679b070dfa2520a7c3830f4.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1812765f31311143ec1d1814dc9834cf75a4f9bf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/e7d6b59bdb4a89299c8efa738966c5ec8d39f7ab.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6188ca23461f22e4683a4bfd20dc456b781bfc28.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8003f65e646074d467a00bc4f9ce46c4cd33cd3c.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2982d49353ccd4e63da81bd543876a0bd17dd62a.png[/img][/carousel]

[h3]Mutually Assured Distraction[/h3]
The Dead Hand collection features 22 all-new gloves guaranteed to add style to your highlight reel.

[carousel][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/214fb25064fffbcf39b02a60f2f7f7a3f55ccc10.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fcf7fb5f2e360aafb6472b6b9548a3a80b3fab58.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/9b488102a51e8edc7f0a9b4b20d4e1c2ac3a95de.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/d75a620125d6e94b1806e164be8a63f48665dd1d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/32e4e5e21262ec489f24bb5e500314bdef00ec2f.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/099a71246cc4770db4cbe5861b960f71587dcba5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/158498c8c37ba0d7e47d3caeedddf698448bcc19.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/7561196054507481cd4776f61cc889953b183a30.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/cb8fd526f8d2a8ef32b5aef4a591fd3b2aabade9.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/8309c0cbbd43405d03217ce391814b09f4f2af97.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/59710d4f950353685468e4dadc322f5f19357b0d.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/3e2566266c3dc14afb3179af8d3f285131d94dd5.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5f08d71bc37a578f3adf7698ed8e55190f25dccf.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/0280e1db9d18cf89a689a0ec953c5908b30e6872.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2d363d6c2bf11215ec9c8cdbda341fadc0a96d55.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/6059229d5d271ce038b355b9ebba4d72ebda8d08.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/5ed63c4b8950f068643a1f43cc034f7fed64ec36.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c5573d9d36b5c88924f8f383086dd7bfbb1df441.png[/img][img]https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/1c76b6778077a158b81050bdf7 Dying to get your hands in these mitts? You can purchase Dead Hand Collection items from Dead Hand Terminals, which are available now as a possible weekly drop.

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Vitaliy
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Starting today, items listed for sale on Steam Community Market will remain in your inventory for use while they are listed (e.g., your weapon can be equipped in your loadout while it is listed). While listed, items cannot be consumed or modified. You can cancel your listings at any time.[/p][/*][*][p]Added ability to set your max offer limit for items in the Terminal, and the Arms Dealer will only show offers up to that limit.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a slight tilt in the chicken running animation.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]Balcony at Bombsite A has been extended.[/p][/*][*][p]Graveyard at Bombsite A has been closed to the public. [/p][/*][*][p]Clipping adjusted at small window next to Second Mid Balcony.[/p][/*][/list][p]Warden[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3256988376"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added hitEntity to OnBulletImpact event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetAbsAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetLocalAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added angularVelocity to Entity.Teleport()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucking()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucked()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where JUMP wouldn't trigger for WasInputJustPressed() and WasInputJustReleased() if the press didn't cross a tick boundary.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where Entity methods GetEyePosition(), GetEyeAngles(), GetHealth(), GetMaxHealth(), and SetMaxHealth() would only work on CSPlayerPawns.[/p][/*][/list]

While listed, items cannot be consumed or modified. You can cancel your listings at any time.[/p][/*][*][p]Added ability to set your max offer limit for items in the Terminal, and the Arms Dealer will only show offers up to that limit.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a slight tilt in the chicken running animation.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Inferno[/p][list][*][p]Balcony at Bombsite A has been extended.[/p][/*][*][p]Graveyard at Bombsite A has been closed to the public. [/p][/*][*][p]Clipping adjusted at small window next to Second Mid Balcony.[/p][/*][/list][p]Warden[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3256988376"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Sanctum[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3643331442"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added hitEntity to OnBulletImpact event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetAbsAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added Entity.GetLocalAngularVelocity()[/p][/*][*][p]Added angularVelocity to Entity.Teleport()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.GetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponBase.SetReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxClipAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSWeaponData.GetMaxReserveAmmo()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucking()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed missing CSPlayerPawn.IsDucked()[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where JUMP wouldn't trigger for WasInputJustPressed() and WasInputJustReleased() if the press didn't cross a tick boundary.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where Entity methods GetEyePosition(), GetEyeAngles(), GetHealth(), GetMaxHealth(), and SetMaxHealth() would only work on CSPlayerPawns.[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: CSGO is back on Steam, if you know where to look
newsitems.author: editor@pcgamesn.com
newsitems.contents:
Counter-Strike 2 has largely been a continued triumph for Valve, sitting atop the Steam charts and consistently pulling daily player-count peaks that nearly double the second-placed Dota 2. Yet some of us crave the way things used to be. If that's you, the good news is that predecessor Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, most affectionately known as CS:GO, is now back on Steam, boasting its own unique page, although you'll need to look closely to find it.

Read the rest of the story...

RELATED LINKS:
Ambitious Counter-Strike mod suspends launch after alleged Valve response
Valve allegedly blocks Counter-Strike mod eight years in the making from Steam
CSGO ranks 2024 - CS:GO MM ranking explained

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]Workshop maps can write up to 1MB of save data.[/p][/*][*][p]Workshop saves leverage Steam Cloud and persist across installs.[/p][/*][*][p]Save data size limit can be configured with sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]Called after all damage properties have been calculated, just before armor and health are modified[/p][/*][*][p]Replaces Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]Includes hitgroup in event data[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added hitgroup to OnPlayerDamage event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]Added enum CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where CSDamageTypes was exported under the name CSDamageType[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Map guides for de_ancient can now be used on de_ancient_night and vice versa.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]Workshop maps can write up to 1MB of save data.[/p][/*][*][p]Workshop saves leverage Steam Cloud and persist across installs.[/p][/*][*][p]Save data size limit can be configured with sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]Called after all damage properties have been calculated, just before armor and health are modified[/p][/*][*][p]Replaces Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]Includes hitgroup in event data[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added hitgroup to OnPlayerDamage event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]Added enum CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where CSDamageTypes was exported under the name CSDamageType[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Map guides for de_ancient can now be used on de_ancient_night and vice versa.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAP SCRIPTING ][/p][list][*][p]Added Instance.SetSaveData[/p][/*][*][p]Added Instance.GetSaveData[/p][list][*][p]Workshop maps can write up to 1MB of save data.[/p][/*][*][p]Workshop saves leverage Steam Cloud and persist across installs.[/p][/*][*][p]Save data size limit can be configured with sv_workshop_map_save_data_max_filesize_mb.[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added Instance.OnModifyPlayerDamage[/p][list][*][p]Called after all damage properties have been calculated, just before armor and health are modified[/p][/*][*][p]Replaces Instance.OnBeforePlayerDamage[/p][/*][*][p]Includes hitgroup in event data[/p][/*][/list][/*][*][p]Added hitgroup to OnPlayerDamage event data[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSDamageFlags.IGNORE_ARMOR[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.IsInputPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustPressed[/p][/*][*][p]Added CSPlayerPawn.WasInputJustReleased[/p][/*][*][p]Added enum CSInputs[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bug where CSDamageTypes was exported under the name CSDamageType[/p][/*][/list][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Map guides for de_ancient can now be used on de_ancient_night and vice versa.[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD GPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Expanding list of console variables addons are allowed to change.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Overpass[/p][list][*][p]Fixed the Party balloons.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD GPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Expanding list of console variables addons are allowed to change.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Overpass[/p][list][*][p]Fixed the Party balloons.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Mitigated a performance issue that primarily affected Windows 10 users with recent Intel CPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where the Delete Item inventory option wasn't working.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case of visual corruption using iron sights on AMD GPUs.[/p][/*][*][p]Expanding list of console variables addons are allowed to change.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Overpass[/p][list][*][p]Fixed the Party balloons.[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where switching firstperson spectator targets would cause viewmodel animations to reset.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where physics calculations far from the origin were causing performance issues.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Anubis[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player clipping around new drop.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping around connector (e-box :P) hole and old drop.[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where switching firstperson spectator targets would cause viewmodel animations to reset.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where physics calculations far from the origin were causing performance issues.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Anubis[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player clipping around new drop.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping around connector (e-box :P) hole and old drop.[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a case where switching firstperson spectator targets would cause viewmodel animations to reset.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where physics calculations far from the origin were causing performance issues.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Anubis[/p][list][*][p]Adjusted player clipping around new drop.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping around connector (e-box :P) hole and old drop.[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Damage from HE grenades that explode mid-air near the ground will no longer be calculated as if they exploded on the ground.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Various knife sound adjustments.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Performance optimizations for exploding chickens.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a map scripting bug where Entity.SetOwner wasn't accepting undefined.[/p][/*][*][p]Added a method for community maps to save modified user settings. Running 'host_writeconfig_with_prompt' will prompt the user for permission to save. If accepted, some of the modified settings (radar, viewmodel, safezones, etc) will be kept after the map exits. [/p][/*][*][p]Community maps are now restricted to a smaller list of allowed console commands. Use -disable_workshop_command_filtering to disable this filtering.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Damage from HE grenades that explode mid-air near the ground will no longer be calculated as if they exploded on the ground.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Various knife sound adjustments.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Performance optimizations for exploding chickens.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a map scripting bug where Entity.SetOwner wasn't accepting undefined.[/p][/*][*][p]Added a method for community maps to save modified user settings. Running 'host_writeconfig_with_prompt' will prompt the user for permission to save. If accepted, some of the modified settings (radar, viewmodel, safezones, etc) will be kept after the map exits. [/p][/*][*][p]Community maps are now restricted to a smaller list of allowed console commands. Use -disable_workshop_command_filtering to disable this filtering.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]

Running 'host_writeconfig_with_prompt' will prompt the user for permission to save. If accepted, some of the modified settings (radar, viewmodel, safezones, etc) will be kept after the map exits. [/p][/*][*][p]Community maps are now restricted to a smaller list of allowed console commands. Use -disable_workshop_command_filtering to disable this filtering.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list]
